ocr.text: In the 2Q FY2025 report for Fresenius SE, the Clinical staffing ratios show a Staffing Ratio of 1:4, Patient Ratio of 1:5, P/E
Ratio of 15.2, and Current Ratio of 1.8, alongside a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.5, Net Margin of 12.4%, Return on Equity of 8.3%,
and Retention Rate of 90%. Further ratios include a Staffing Ratio of 1:6, Patient Ratio of 1:4.5, P/E Ratio of 14.8, and Current
Ratio of 1.7, with a Debt/Equity of 0.6, Net Margin of 11.8%, Return on Equity of 7.9%, and Retention Rate of 92%.

Additionally, a Staffing Ratio of 1:5.5, Patient Ratio of 1:6.5, P/E Ratio of 16.0, and Current Ratio of 1.9 are noted with a
Debt/Equity of 0.4, Net Margin of 13.2%, Return on Equity of 9.1%, and Retention Rate of 88%, while the last set shows a
Staffing Ratio of 1:7, Patient Ratio of 1:5.2, P/E Ratio of 15.5, Current Ratio of 2.1, Debt/Equity of 0.6, Net Margin of 11.8%,
Return on Equity of 7.9%, and Retention Rate of 92%. In Medical Device Segments, Surgical Devices revenue is $45M,
Diagnostic Equipment revenue is $30M, and Total Revenue is $75M, with Units Sold at 5000, Headcount at 200, Number of
Branches at 15, Surgical Units at 3000, and Diagnostic Units at 150, totaling 8000 units sold across 350 branches, representing
a Market Share of 25%.
